name: 💫Spaicy Chicross [Spaicy Project]💫
description:
● INFORMATION

Name: Spaicy Chicross

Age: 21

Birthday: April 7

Height: 5,4 ft / 165 cm

Weight: 132 lbs / 60 kg

Feature: Animal

● WHO IS SHE - ORIGIN

Spaicy is a cheerful and energetic girl, who likes to go on an adventure touring the world. From a very young age, she was trained by her father, Beckwell; who taught her various combat techniques.

She lives with her family on the outsides of Crystal City.

Spaicy uses a magic whip as a weapon, with which she can use different powers, including flying.

Her currently objective is solve the energy crisis of Snoworld.

● CURIOSITIES

Spaicy enjoys playing video games and spending time with her best friends, Rex and Mint.

She loves to eat.

She is bad at math but good solving problems with ingenuity.

She is very persistent and stubborn.

She loves to do outdoor sports.
creator: CanadaCrimson
